name: make_chart
description: 用 Python matplotlib 生成统计图表（柱状图 bar、折线图 line、饼图 pie、散点图 scatter），支持中文标签。生成 PNG 图片到 workspace-temporary 并返回文件路径。
parameters: {"type":"object","properties":{"type":{"type":"string","description":"图表类型：bar 柱状图、line 折线图、pie 饼图、scatter 散点图"},"title":{"type":"string","description":"图表标题"},"data":{"type":"object","description":"图表数据对象"},"filename":{"type":"string","description":"输出文件名（不含路径），默认 chart_时间戳.png"}},"required":["type","data"]}

name: zvec_db
description: zvec 向量数据库统一操作工具。底层调用本地 venv 中的 zvec 0.5.0。适用场景：RAG、语义搜索、相似度匹配、知识库管理。支持的 action: create/insert/search_vector/search_fts/search_hybrid/info/list/count/delete。返回 JSON 字符串。
handler: async function run(args) { const { execSync } = await import('child_process'); const VENV_PY = '/opt/cclaw-client/UbuntuClaw/xCrab/data/workspace-permanent/zvec-env/bin/python3'; const HELPER = '/opt/cclaw-client/UbuntuClaw/xCrab/data/workspace-permanent/zvec_tool.py'; const input = JSON.stringify(args); let stdout, stderr = ''; try { stdout = execSync(`${VENV_PY} ${HELPER}`, { input, encoding: 'utf-8', maxBuffer: 50 * 1024 * 1024, timeout: 120000 }); } catch (e) { return { error: 'helper process failed', message: e.message, stdout: e.stdout ? String(e.stdout) : '', stderr: e.stderr ? String(e.stderr) : '', status: e.status }; } try { return JSON.parse(stdout); } catch (e) { return { raw_output: stdout, parse_error: e.message, stderr }; } } return run(args);

name: browse_v2
description: 通过 agent-browser 驱动真实 Chromium 浏览器。支持 sandbox 选项（容器环境必须设 false），支持 open/close/snapshot/click/fill/screenshot 等完整操作。自动检测容器环境并默认关闭 sandbox。
parameters: {"type":"object","properties":{"action":{"type":"string","description":"操作类型：open（打开URL）、close（关闭浏览器）、snapshot（获取无障碍树）、click（点击）、fill（填表）、screenshot（截图）、get（获取页面信息）、eval（执行JS）","enum":["open","close","snapshot","click","fill","screenshot","get","eval"]},"url":{"type":"string","description":"要打开的URL（action=open 时必填）"},"selector":{"type":"string","description":"CSS选择器或@ref引用（action=click/fill/screenshot/get/eval 时用）"},"text":{"type":"string","description":"要填入的文本（action=fill 时必填）"},"sandbox":{"type":"boolean","description":"是否启用Chrome沙箱。容器/Docker/无root环境必须设为 false。默认 true","default":true},"session":{"type":"string","description":"会话名，隔离不同浏览任务（默认 default）"},"code":{"type":"string","description":"要执行的JS代码（action=eval 时必填）"},"what":{"type":"string","description":"get 操作类型：title、url、text、html、value","enum":["title","url","text","html","value"]},"outfile":{"type":"string","description":"截图保存路径（action=screenshot 时可选）"}},"required":["action"]}

name: env_probe
description: 探测 create_tool handler 沙箱中可用的全局对象和函数。只读取信息，不执行任何副作用。返回 JSON 格式的报告。用于了解沙箱能力。
parameters: {"type":"object","properties":{"mode":{"type":"string","description":"探测模式：globals（列出全局）、native（尝试调用原生函数）、typeof（typeof 所有候选）","enum":["globals","native","typeof"]}},"required":[]}
